evals.name: fresh-install-doctor-driven
evals.prompt: I just cloned HotPlex and need to set up the complete environment. Check all dependencies and guide me through installation.
evals.expected_output: Skill should run `hotplex doctor --json` first. If hotplex is not installed, guide through binary install + `hotplex onboard`. Should parse the doctor JSON report and address each failed/warned item by category (environment, config, dependencies, security, runtime, messaging, stt, tts, agent_config). Should NOT manually check each dependency one by one — rely on doctor output.

assertions.name: doctor-first
assertions.text: Runs hotplex doctor as first diagnostic step

assertions.name: category-handling
assertions.text: Handles diagnostics by category (environment, config, dependencies, etc.)

assertions.name: onboard-mentioned
assertions.text: Mentions hotplex onboard as installation option

assertions.name: fix-guidance
assertions.text: Provides targeted fix for each failed item

evals.name: stt-troubleshooting
evals.prompt: STT isn't working. The error says 'stt_once.py not found'. Help me fix the STT setup.
evals.expected_output: Skill should identify this as an STT issue, check Python packages (funasr-onnx, modelscope), verify STT model download status, check STT configuration, and provide targeted fix. Should reference references/stt.md for detailed STT configuration.

evals.name: tts-ffmpeg-missing
evals.prompt: HotPlex doctor 报告 tts.runtime 失败，说 ffmpeg 未找到。怎么修复？
evals.expected_output: Skill should identify this as a TTS/ffmpeg issue, provide platform-specific ffmpeg installation commands, explain why ffmpeg is needed (MP3 to Opus conversion for voice messages), and reference references/tts.md for detailed TTS configuration.

assertions.name: ffmpeg-install
assertions.text: Provides ffmpeg installation commands for relevant platform
assertions.pattern: brew install ffmpeg|apt install ffmpeg|choco install ffmpeg

evals.name: chinese-onboard
evals.prompt: 我第一次使用 HotPlex，需要帮忙安装和配置飞书对接。
evals.expected_output: Skill should guide user through: 1) Install HotPlex binary, 2) Run `hotplex onboard` for interactive setup, 3) Focus on Feishu-specific configuration (app_id, app_secret), 4) Validate credentials, 5) Verify with doctor.

evals.name: quick-verification
evals.prompt: Quick check if HotPlex environment is ready to run.
evals.expected_output: Skill should run `hotplex doctor --json` as the primary diagnostic. Parse the summary field. If all pass, confirm ready. If failures, list them by category with quick fix hints.

assertions.name: doctor-run
assertions.text: Runs hotplex doctor for quick check

assertions.name: result-interpreted
assertions.text: Interprets and reports the result clearly

assertions.name: fix-hints
assertions.text: Provides fix hints for any issues found
